name: Marinated Beef Jerky
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Beef (your choice); if not tender, cut it; slice paper thin or 1/8 to 1/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim all fat from the beef.
2. Mix together pepper, onion powder, garlic salt, soy sauce, and Worcestershire sauce.
3. Marinate the meat in the mixture overnight.
4. Remove the meat from the marinade and pat it dry between layers of paper towels.
5. Line a cookie sheet with foil and arrange the meat in a single layer on the sheet.
6. Dry the meat at 200°F for 8 or more hours, turning after 6 hours.
7. Cool and store in a tightly covered jar or sealed plastic bag.
Note: I use a vacuum sealer to store it in a canning jar with the sealing attachment.
